params.name: name
params.description: The name of the hash key.

returns.description: Returns a list which contains for each field in the request: - `-2` if the field does not exist, or if the key does not exist. - `-1` if the field exists but has no associated expiration time. - `1` if the expiration time was successfully removed from the field.

params.name: fields
params.description: one or more fields to remove the TTL for.

returns.description: a list of Long values for each of the fields provided: 1 indicating expiration time is removed; -1 field has no expiration time to be removed; -2 indicating there is no such field @since 6.4

params.name: fields
params.description: one or more fields to remove the TTL for.

returns.description: a list of Long values for each of the fields provided: 1 indicating expiration time is removed; -1 field has no expiration time to be removed; -2 indicating there is no such field @since 6.4

params.name: fields
params.description: one or more fields to remove the TTL for.

returns.description: a list of Long values for each of the fields provided: 1 indicating expiration time is removed; -1 field has no expiration time to be removed; -2 indicating there is no such field @since 6.4

nredisstack_sync.signature: HashFieldPersist(RedisKey key, RedisValue[] hashFields, CommandFlags flags = CommandFlags.None)

params.name: hashFields
params.description: The fields in the hash to remove expire time.

params.name: flags
params.description: The flags to use for this operation.

returns.description: Empty array if the key does not exist. Otherwise, returns the result of operation for given fields: <list type="table"> <listheader> <term>Result</term> <description>Description</description> </listheader> <item> <term>1</term> <description>Expiration time was removed.</description> </item> <item> <term>-1</term> <description>Field has no associated expiration time.</description> </item> <item> <term>-2</term> <description>No such field exists.</description> </item> </list>
